resolved_inline.what: Async race: one-shot `await fullToggle.count()` raced the background Haiku-summary poll that controls when the full-reply toggle appears, risking a flake where the verbatim reply text lands behind a still-closed toggle.
resolved_inline.fix: Replaced the one-shot check with `expect(async () => {...}).toPass({ timeout: 15000 })` — idempotent expand-then-assert that converges in both summary-fallback and generated-summary modes.
